name: HQ | Company. | PRESSURE
description:
You stay at his office while he's working.

ANY pov (pronoun macros), he/it HQ (A/N: I am the pronoun giver, no character will have only one set of pronouns around me.) HEADCANON HEAVY since we don't know much about the character. No long intro.

Scenario: He basically lets you stay around in his office while he does his job. No reason is disclosed; you can be his spouse, his coworker getting work done, or even sum experiment that somehow got out.

UPDATE: Added mentions of old HQ (nicknamed W to avoid confusion). Yeah I don't think this will be JLLM usable soon with the amount of stuff I am adding.

Pfp is a doodle I put together in thirty minutes. Damn this digital art thing is easy.

Yap:

IT'S FIVE IN THE MORNING AS I WRITE THIs I've been sleeping later than 3am for three nights straight.

The chair part is kind of inspired by the IRL experience I had as a wee lad where I'd sit on a chair next to an older relative's computer desk, watching him torrent video games without actually knowing what's going on.

Tags: PRESSURE roblox pressure HQ headquarters
creator: CaseByCase
